member.name: T:Exceptionless.RandomData
member.summary: Generates random data for use in unit tests and data seeding.

member.name: P:Exceptionless.RandomData.Instance
member.summary: Gets the shared instance. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetInt(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random integer in the inclusive range [, ].
member.remarks: Returns immediately when both values are equal.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetInt
member.summary: Returns a random integer across the full range.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetVersion(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a random version string between and . Defaults to a range of "0.0.0.0" – "25.100.9999.9999" when either bound is null or empty.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetLong(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Returns a random in the inclusive range [, ].
member.remarks: Returns immediately when both values are equal.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetLong
member.summary: Returns a random across the full range.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetCoordinate
member.summary: Returns a random latitude/longitude coordinate string in the form "lat,lng".

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetDateTime(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns a random between and . Defaults to and when not specified.
member.remarks: Returns immediately when both values are equal.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetDateTimeOffset(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Returns a random between and . Defaults to and when not specified.
member.exception: is greater than or equal to .

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetTimeSpan(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Returns a random between and . Defaults to and when not specified.
member.remarks: Returns immediately when both values are equal.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetBool(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true with the given probability percentage.
member.param: Probability of returning true, from 0 (never) to 100 (always). Clamped to [0, 100].

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetDouble(System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Returns a random in the inclusive range [, ]. Defaults to and when not specified.
member.remarks: Returns immediately when both values are equal.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetDecimal
member.summary: Returns a random using two random integers as bounds.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetDecimal(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random in the range [, ].

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetEnum``1
member.summary: Returns a random value from the enum type .

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetIp4Address
member.summary: Returns a random IPv4 address string in the form "a.b.c.d".

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetString(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a random string of the specified length using as the character pool. Uses a cryptographically secure source to eliminate modulo bias.
member.param: Minimum length of the generated string.
Maximum length of the generated string.
Pool of characters to pick from. Must contain 256 or fewer distinct characters.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetAlphaString(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random alpha string (no ambiguous characters such as l/1 or O/0).

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetAlphaNumericString(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random alphanumeric string (no ambiguous characters such as l/1 or O/0).

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetTitleWords(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a title-cased phrase of random lorem ipsum words.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetWord(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a single random lorem ipsum word, optionally title-cased.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetWords(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a space-separated phrase of random lorem ipsum words.
member.param: Minimum number of words. Must be 2 or more.
Maximum number of words. Must be 2 or more.
Whether to title-case the first word.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetSentence(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random lorem ipsum sentence ending with a period.
member.param: Minimum number of words. Must be 3 or more.
Maximum number of words. Must be 3 or more.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.RandomData.GetParagraphs(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns one or more paragraphs of random lorem ipsum text.
member.param: Number of paragraphs. Must be 1 or more.
Minimum sentences per paragraph. Must be 1 or more.

When true, wraps each paragraph in

tags.

member.name: T:Exceptionless.EnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for providing random element selection.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.EnumerableExtensions.Random``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},``0)
member.summary: Returns a random element from , or if the sequence is null or empty. The return value is non-null when is non-null.
